title: Vendor containers/buildah
body:
Pull in fixes to build for single and two line Dockerfiles.

Fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2248

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
This seems to be hung up in CI/  Manually merging.

I just noticed that this PR was not clean. When running `make vendor` on it, much more things are pulled in. Now, ./vendor/github.com/containers/buildah has files from two different commits.

I will revert this commit in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2259. Once @baude's cobra PR is merged here, we can continue. Otherwise, builds will fail.
